author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Formalize BDC Designer packet evidence states into a compact semantics layer that distinguishes measured support, inferred support, missingness, and contradiction without collapsing them into ad hoc labels.
research_question: Can BDC Designer turn its packet evidence-state handling into a bounded semantics layer that improves reasoning quality while remaining compatible with the existing intake and client-bundle workflows?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after calibration, selective prediction, and generalized-risk outputs are already defined so that semantics are aligned to the final operator contract.

out_of_scope: new architecture-search algorithm beyond semantics integration
